info.longName: Roundhill S&P 500 No Dividend Target ETF

funds_data.description: The Advisor intends to provide exposure to the S&P 500® Index by investing in ETFs that seek to track the performance of the S&P 500® Index (“S&P 500 ETFs”). Under normal market conditions, the fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the S&P 500® Index (including S&P 500 ETFs). The fund is non-diversified.

top_holdings.Name: State Street® SPDR® Port S&P 500® ETF
